# Omni-Video

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/OmniVideo`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/OmniVideo/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-B86SwPYh.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-omni-video`
- `query-omni-video`
- `query-omni-video-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/omni-video`
- `/v1/videos/omni-video/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Omni-Video",zh:"Omni-Video"},endpoints:[{id:"create-omni-video",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/omni-video",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"The Omni model can achieve various capabilities through Prompt with elements, images, videos, and other content.",zh:"Omni 模型可以通过 Prompt 结合元素、图片、视频等内容实现多种能力。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-video-o1",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-video-o1"]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Text prompt words, which can include positive and negative descriptions.",zh:"文本提示词，可包含正向描述和负向描述。"},notes:[{en:"- The prompt words can be templated to meet different video generation needs",zh:"- 可将提示词模板化来满足不同的视频生成需求"},{en:"- Must not exceed 2,500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2,500 个字符"},{en:"The Omni model can achieve various capabilities through Prompt with elements, images, videos, and other content:\n- Specify elements/images/videos using <<<>>> format, e.g.: <<<element_1>>>, <<<image_1>>>, <<<video_1>>>\n- For detailed capabilities, see: [KLING Omni Model User Guide](https://app.klingai.com/global/quickstart/klingai-video-o1-user-guide)",zh:"Omni模型可通过Prompt与主体、图片、视频等内容实现多种能力：\n- 通过<<<>>>的格式来指定某个主体、图片或视频，如：<<<element_1>>>、<<<image_1>>>、<<<video_1>>>\n- 能力范围详见使用手册：[可灵Omni模型使用指南](https://docs.qingque.cn/d/home/eZQCg5xHvxDaE-jP2GcnaNc6O?identityId=2Cn18n4EIHT)"}]},{name:"image_list",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Image List, including element, scene, style reference images.",zh:"参考图列表，包括主体、场景、风格等参考图片。"},notes:[{en:"**First/End Frame Usage:**\n- Can be used as first frame or end frame to generate video\n- Use `type` parameter to define: `first_frame` for first frame, `end_frame` for end frame\n- End frame only is NOT supported - first frame is required when using end frame\n- Video editing function cannot be used when generating video with first/end frame",zh:"**首尾帧用法：**\n- 可作为首帧或尾帧生成视频\n- 通过 `type` 参数定义：`first_frame` 为首帧，`end_frame` 为尾帧\n- 暂时不支持仅尾帧，即有尾帧图时必须有首帧图\n- 首帧或首尾帧生视频时，不能使用视频编辑功能"},{en:"**Image Requirements:**\n- Supports Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)\n- Formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png\n- File size: ≤10MB\n- Dimensions: min 300px, aspect ratio 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1",zh:"**图片要求：**\n- 支持传入图片Base64编码或图片URL（确保可访问）\n- 格式：.jpg / .jpeg / .png\n- 文件大小：≤10MB\n- 尺寸：宽和高都不小于300px，宽高比1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1"},{en:"**Quantity Limits:**\n- With reference video: max 4 images\n- Without reference video: max 7 images\n- Setting end frame is NOT supported when >2 images in array",zh:"**数量限制：**\n- 有参考视频时，参考图片数量不得超过4\n- 无参考视频时，参考图片数量不得超过7\n- 数组中超过2张图片时，不支持设置尾帧"},{en:"- `image_url` parameter value must not be empty",zh:"- `image_url` 参数值不得为空"}],children:[{name:"image_url",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Image URL or Base64",zh:"图片 URL 或 Base64"}},{name:"type",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Frame type: first_frame or end_frame",zh:"帧类型：first_frame 为首帧，end_frame 为尾帧"},enum:["first_frame","end_frame"]}]},{name:"element_list",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Element List, based on element ID from element library.",zh:"主体参考列表，基于主体库中主体的ID配置。"},notes:[{en:"**Quantity Limits (combined with image_list):**\n- With reference video: image count + element count ≤ 4\n- Without reference video: image count + element count ≤ 7",zh:"**数量限制（与image_list合计）：**\n- 有参考视频时，参考图片数量和参考主体数量之和不得超过4\n- 无参考视频时，参考图片数量和参考主体数量之和不得超过7"},{en:'- Load with key:value format as follows:\n```json\n"element_list":[\n  { "element_id": 829836802793406551 }\n]\n```',zh:'- 用 key:value 承载，如下：\n```json\n"element_list":[\n  { "element_id": 829836802793406551 }\n]\n```'}],children:[{name:"element_id",type:"long",required:!0,description:{en:"Element ID from element library",zh:"主体库中的主体 ID"}}]},{name:"video_list",type:"array",required:!1,description:{en:"Reference Video, obtained via URL.",zh:"参考视频，通过URL方式获取。"},notes:[{en:"**Video Types:**\n- Can be used as feature reference video OR base video for editing (default: base)\n- Use `refer_type` parameter: `feature` for feature reference, `base` for video to be edited\n- When reference video is base type, first/end frames cannot be defined\n- Use `keep_original_sound` to keep original sound: `yes` to keep, `no` to discard (also applies to feature type)",zh:"**视频类型：**\n- 可作为特征参考视频，也可作为待编辑视频，默认为待编辑视频\n- 通过 `refer_type` 参数区分参考视频类型：`feature` 为特征参考视频，`base` 为待编辑视频\n- 参考视频为待编辑视频时，不能定义视频首尾帧\n- 通过 `keep_original_sound` 参数选择是否保留视频原声：`yes` 保留，`no` 不保留（对 feature 类型也生效）"},{en:"**Video Requirements:**\n- Format: MP4/MOV only\n- Duration: 3-10 seconds\n- Resolution: 720px-2160px (width and height)\n- Frame rate: 24-60fps (output will be 24fps)\n- Max 1 video, size ≤200MB",zh:"**视频要求：**\n- 格式：仅支持 MP4/MOV\n- 时长：3-10秒\n- 分辨率：720px-2160px（宽高尺寸）\n- 帧率：24-60fps（生成视频时会输出为24fps）\n- 至多1段视频，大小≤200MB"},{en:"- `video_url` parameter value must not be empty",zh:"- `video_url` 参数值不得为空"}],children:[{name:"video_url",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Video URL",zh:"视频 URL"}},{name:"refer_type",type:"string",required:!1,default:"base",description:{en:"Reference type: feature (feature reference) or base (video to be edited)",zh:"参考类型：feature（特征参考视频）或 base（待编辑视频）"},enum:["feature","base"],notes:[{en:"**`base` - Transformation (Video Edit):**\nEdit video content - add/remove/modify elements, change shot composition, angles, styles, colors, weather, etc.",zh:"**`base` - 指令变换（视频编辑）：**\n视频编辑，例如增加/删除/修改内容（主体/背景/局部/视频风格/物体颜色/天气等），切换景别/视角。"},{en:"**`feature` - Video Reference:**\nReference video content to generate next/previous shot, or reference video style/camera movement.",zh:"**`feature` - 视频参考：**\n参考视频内容生成下一个镜头/上一个镜头，或者参考视频的风格/运镜方式进行视频生成。"}]},{name:"keep_original_sound",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Keep original sound: yes to keep, no to discard",zh:"保留原声：yes 保留，no 不保留"},enum:["yes","no"]}]},{name:"mode",type:"string",required:!1,default:"pro",description:{en:"Video generation mode",zh:"生成视频的模式"},enum:["std","pro"],notes:[{en:"- `std`: Standard mode, cost-effective\n- `pro`: Professional mode (high quality), better video quality output",zh:"- 其中std：标准模式（标准），基础模式，性价比高\n- 其中pro：专家模式（高品质），高表现模式，生成视频质量更佳"},{en:"The support range for different model versions and video modes varies. For details, see [Capability Map](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)",zh:"不同模型版本、视频模式支持范围不同，详见 [能力地图](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/skillsMap)"}]},{name:"aspect_ratio",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Aspect ratio of generated video frame (width:height)",zh:"生成视频的画面纵横比（宽:高）"},enum:["16:9","9:16","1:1"],notes:[{en:"- This parameter is **required** when NOT using first-frame reference or video editing function.",zh:"- 未使用首帧参考或视频编辑功能时，当前参数**必填**。"},{en:"**Support Matrix:**\n| Scenario | Supported |\n| --- | --- |\n| Text-to-video | ✓ |\n| Image/Element reference | ✓ |\n| Video reference (Other) | ✓ |\n | Video reference (Generate next/previous shot) | ✓ |\n| Transformation (video edit, base) | ✗ |\n| Image-to-video (first/end frame) | ✗ |",zh:"**支持情况：**\n| 场景 | 是否支持 |\n| --- | --- |\n| 文生视频 | ✓ |\n| 图片/主体参考 | ✓ |\n| 视频参考 (其他) | ✓ |\n| 视频参考 (生成上一个/下一个镜头) | ✓ |\n| 指令变换（视频编辑, base）| ✗ |\n| 图生视频（首尾帧）| ✗ |"}]},{name:"duration",type:"string",required:!1,default:"5",description:{en:"Video duration in seconds",zh:"生成视频时长，单位s"},enum:["3","4","5","6","7","8","9","10"],notes:[{en:"**Support Matrix:**\n| Scenario | Supported Values |\n| --- | --- |\n| Text-to-video, Image-to-video (without first/end frame) | 3-10 |\n| Video editing (`refer_type`: `base`) | Follows input video duration (parameter ignored) |\n| Other cases (image+element without video, or video with `refer_type`: `feature`) | 3-10 |",zh:"**支持情况：**\n| 场景 | 支持值 |\n| --- | --- |\n| 文生视频、图生视频（不含首尾帧）| 3-10 |\n| 有视频输入（video_list不为空）且 使用视频编辑功能（`refer_type`: `base`）时：不可指定时长，跟视频对齐| 跟随输入视频时长（参数无效）|\n| 其他情况（无视频+图片/主体生视频，或视频类型为 `feature`）| 3-10 |"},{en:"When using video editing function, billing is calculated by rounding the input video duration to the nearest integer.",zh:"使用视频编辑功能时，按输入视频时长四舍五入取整计量计费。"}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Callback notification URL for task result. If configured, server will actively notify when task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知。"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Custom task ID defined by user.",zh:"自定义任务ID。"},notes:[{en:"- Will not overwrite system-generated task ID, but supports querying task by this ID.",zh:"- 传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务ID，但支持通过该ID进行任务查询。"},{en:"- Must be unique within a single user account.",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性。"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_info": { //任务创建时的参数信息\n      "external_task_id": "string" //客户自定义任务ID\n    },\n    "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n Choose either task_id OR external_task_id for querying.",zh:"创建任务时填写的external_task_id，与task_id两种查询方式二选一。"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n    "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n    "task_status_msg": "string", // 任务状态信息，当任务失败时展示失败原因（如触发平台的内容风控等）\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // 任务最终扣减积分数值\n    "watermark_info": {\n      "enabled": boolean\n    },\n    "task_info": { //任务创建时的参数信息\n      "external_task_id": "string" //客户自定义任务ID\n    },\n    "task_result": {\n      "videos": [\n        {\n          "id": "string", // 生成的视频ID；全局唯一\n          "url": "string", // 生成视频的URL，防盗链格式（请注意，为保障信息安全，生成的图片/视频会在30天后被清理，请及时转存）\n          "watermark_url": "string", // 含水印视频下载URL，防盗链格式\n          "duration": "string" //视频总时长，单位s\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // 任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 //任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error codes; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", // Error information\n  "request_id": "string", // Request ID, generated by the system, is used for tracking requests and troubleshooting\n  "data": {\n    "task_id": "string", // Task ID, generated by the system\n    "task_status": "string", // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed\n    "task_status_msg": "string", // Task status message, displaying the failure reason when the task fails (such as triggering the content risk control of the platform, etc.)\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // Final unit deduction for the task\n    "watermark_info": {\n      "enabled": boolean\n    },\n    "task_info": { //Task creation parameters\n      "external_task_id": "string" //User-defined task ID\n    },\n    "task_result": {\n      "videos": [\n        {\n          "id": "string", // Generated video ID; globally unique\n          "url": "string", // Generated video URL, anti-leech format (Please note that for security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days. Please save them promptly.)\n          "watermark_url": "string", // Watermarked video download URL, anti-leech format\n          "duration": "string" //Total video duration, unit: s (seconds)\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    "created_at": 1722769557708, // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n    "updated_at": 1722769557708 //Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n  }\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:"curl --request GET \\\n  --url https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/omni-video/{task_id} \\\n  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'",en:"curl <token>'"}}]},{id:"query-omni-video-list",method:"GET",path:"/v1/videos/omni-video",title:{en:"Query Task (List)",zh:"查询任务（列表）"},description:{en:"Query a list of tasks with Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API 1000]"}]},{name:"pageSize",type:"int",required:!1,default:"30",description:{en:"Data volume per page",zh:"每页数据量"},notes:[{en:"Value range: [1, 500]",zh:"取值范围：[1, 500]"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": [\n    {\n      "task_id": "string", // 任务ID，系统生成\n      "task_status": "string", // 任务状态，枚举值：submitted（已提交）、processing（处理中）、succeed（成功）、failed（失败）\n      "task_status_msg": "string", // 任务状态信息，当任务失败时展示失败原因（如触发平台的内容风控等）\n      "final_unit_deduction": "string", // 任务最终扣减积分数值\n      "watermark_info": {\n        "enabled": boolean\n      },\n      "task_info": { //任务创建时的参数信息\n        "external_task_id": "string" //任务ID，客户自定义生成，与task_id两种查询方式二选一\n      },\n      "task_result": {\n        "videos": [\n          {\n            "id": "string", // 生成的视频ID；全局唯一\n            "url": "string", // 生成视频的URL，防盗链格式（请注意，为保障信息安全，生成的图片/视频会在30天后被清理，请及时转存）\n            "watermark_url": "string", // 含水印视频下载URL，防盗链格式\n            "duration": "string" //视频总时长，单位s\n          }\n        ]\n      },\n      "created_at": 1722769557708, // 任务创建时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n      "updated_at": 1722769557708 //任务更新时间，Unix时间戳、单位ms\n    }\n  ]\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error codes; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", // Error information\n  "request_id": "string", // Request ID, generated by the system, is used for tracking requests and troubleshooting\n  "data": [\n    {\n      "task_id": "string", // Task ID, generated by the system\n      "task_status": "string", // Task status, Enum values: submitted, processing, succeed, failed\n      "task_status_msg": "string", // Task status message, displaying the failure reason when the task fails (such as triggering the content risk control of the platform, etc.)\n      "final_unit_deduction": "string", // Final unit deduction for the task\n      "watermark_info": {\n        "enabled": "task_result": {\n        "videos": [\n          {\n            "id": "string", // Generated video ID; globally unique\n            "url": "string", // Generated video URL, anti-leech format (Please note that for security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days. Please save them promptly.)\n            "watermark_url": "string", // Watermarked video download URL, anti-leech format\n            "duration": "string" //Total video duration, unit: s (seconds)\n          }\n        ]\n      },\n      "created_at": 1722769557708, // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n      "updated_at": 1722769557708 //Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n    }\n  ]\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:"curl --request GET \\\n  --url 'https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/omni-video?pageNum=1&pageSize=30' \\\n  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'",en:"curl --request GET \\\n  --url 'https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/videos/omni-video?pageNum=1&pageSize=30' \\\n  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'"}}]}]};export{e as apiData};
```
